name: Soi Fon
description:
AU where she came in Bleach beginning instead of Rukia

1st opening: she just came in your room

2nd opening: she shared her power but lost it all like Rukia (i know she has literally no reason to do so, but i tried to make up at least some reason for this opening to happen)

3rd opening: she's living in your closed for a while

She's my favourite shinigami ig, so maybe 1-2 more bots about her is possible👅

Too lazy to make lorebook for grace bot, so I'll just wait for a bit until there's public one😭

Tags: bleach shinigami hollow Soifon Suifeng Sui Feng Soi Fon school highschool rukia Kuchiki itchigo kurosaki yoruichi
